fields.name: Parent Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item in which the component is included.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Active
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the component is in use.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Date Installed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the component was installed.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the component.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the component.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip:
Contains an additional description of the component.
Depending on the value in the Type field, the program copies the description automatically from the Item or the Service Item table when you fill in the No. field.

fields.name: Service Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order under which this component was replaced.

fields.name: From Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number assigned to the component when it was an active component of the service item.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the component was last modified.
